comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *jwhonce* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [jwhonce] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Where is the panic that you're seeing?  My (maybe mis-)understanding was the FileInfo was not supposed to be nil on error.
Otherwise LGTM, tests aren't hip.
and fwiw, I'm doing similar in https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4389, may need to touch that up too.

@TomSweeneyRedHat https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4404/files#diff-cab9fc8e95d19f0007ff886cff814b55L74 panics when FileInfo is nil.  I reviewed the golang library source and FileInfo is nil on any error.  I didn't trap the error I was seeing just checked the library source and changed your code to stop the de-referencing nil. Maybe permission denied?
